name: 12' Christmas Alberta Warm White Led with Autoconnect with Power Pole and Foot Pedal - Wondershop™
description:
Elevate your holiday decor with this Christmas Alberta Tree from Wondershop™. This Alberta Christmas tree is designed in a slim shape for a minimalistic touch. Flame-resistant, this holiday tree features 700 LED bulbs that cast a warm glow, creating a festive ambiance. It features a power plus pole and a foot pedal for quick and easy connection and control. Suitable for indoor use only, this Christmas tree will bring a touch of elegance and joy to your holiday celebrations.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
